examples: I was embarrassed how to punish him when I discovered his part in the business: he's such a cobweb, a pinch would annihilate him.
Postulating the effect is one thing; teasing it out from the cobweb of climatic feedback loops and estimating its magnitude is something else altogether.
He brushed a cobweb out of his hair.
The Vellus Aureum wool fibers must measure a mere 13.9 microns (closer to the fineness of a cobweb).
